summary: Updated the project memory MCP instructions across all rule and plugin files. Changed references from 'memory_stats' to 'project_memory_overview', from 'memory_query_file' to 'search_file_memory_by_path', from 'memory_search' to 'search_project_memory_by_topic', and from 'memory_get' to 'recall_memory'. Updated the database path pattern from 'project_memory.db' to 'mcp-project-memory.sqlite'. Changed link strength range from 0.0-1.0 to 0-100. Updated build commands from './project-memory rebuild' to 'make build-memories'.
